element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn resource economy before complex threats
Basic combat unit, requires refueling/docking management
Introduces specialized roles (repair corvettes, salvage corvettes)
Mid-tier combat units, scaling fleet complexity
Heavy combat units, tactical formation requirements
Apex combat units, endgame fleet composition
Tech-tree progression, unlocks new ship types
Towing enemy ships to mothership for fleet expansion
Alternative to ballistic weapons, strategic choice
Level completion trigger, strategic resource gathering window

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Mission-driven with escalating complexity; early levels teach systems, mid-game intensifies with multiple threats, late-game features sustained pressure and resource management stress

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Resource clouds and debris fields; players can choose to harvest more before hyperspace jump

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to harvesting, basic combat, single ship types; safe learning environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multiple ship types available, complex formations required, enemy variety increases, resource management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-difficulty encounters, apex units introduced, sustained multi-front battles, heavy reliance on fleet composition and tactical positioning
notable_spikes: Final campaign missions with veteran Taiidan forces
Missions requiring simultaneous resource gathering and active defense

notable_level_patterns.description: Player harvests resources in relative peace, then enemies arrive in waves; tension builds as fleet must defend harvesting operations
Initial mission objective changes as narrative unfolds; example: defend mothership becomes 'destroy enemy carrier'
Salvaging enemy ships adds captured units to fleet, providing tactical flexibility and new capabilities
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-campaign levels with salvage corvette availability

notable_level_patterns.description: New ship types unlock through research vessel tech trees, creating mid-level power spikes
